name: DigiCert
description: DigiCert — digital certificate provider for TLS, PKI, IoT, and code signing.

seo.title: DigiCert — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: DigiCert: DigiCert — digital certificate provider for TLS, PKI, IoT, and code signing.

when_to_use: TLS certificate issuance via CertCentral API at scale
Code signing certificate management for software releases
IoT device PKI provisioning and lifecycle management
Extended validation TLS for financial services web portals

pros: Trusted CA with broad browser and OS roots
Covers TLS, code signing, IoT, and S/MIME
CertCentral portal with API for automation
cons: Pricey compared to Let's Encrypt or ZeroSSL
Approval processes slow for EV/OV certs
review.verdict: Reliable commercial CA for compliance-heavy use cases where Let's Encrypt just won't cut it.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing EV, code signing, or IoT certs with a trusted vendor.
review.not_for: Startups who can live with free DV certs and ACME.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
